name: ADA and accessibility research
description: Research accessibility requirements (ADA, ANSI A117.1, and state-specific) for an educational facility. Validate multi-standard research and layered requirements.

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Research all accessibility requirements that apply to this school project. Include ADA, ANSI A117.1, and any Maryland-specific requirements.

expected_behavior: Phase 1: Identifies project as educational occupancy in Maryland
Phase 1: Generates outline covering door clearances, accessible routes, restrooms, signage, drinking fountains, assembly areas
Phase 1: Asks user to confirm or modify research topics
Phase 2: Researches federal ADA 2010 Standards requirements
Phase 2: Researches applicable ANSI A117.1 edition (per adopted IBC)
Phase 2: Searches for Maryland-specific accessibility requirements (COMAR)
Phase 2: Identifies whether Maryland exceeds federal ADA in any area
Phase 2: Provides per-topic findings with code section citations
Phase 3: Report includes layered requirements (federal floor + state additions)
ground_truth_notes: Licensed architect documented applicable accessibility standards, editions, and state-specific requirements for educational facilities in Maryland.

multi_standard_coverage.description: Correctly identified ADA, ANSI A117.1 edition, and Maryland COMAR accessibility code

topic_coverage.description: Percentage of relevant accessibility topics covered

code_citation_accuracy.description: Correct ADA section and ANSI A117.1 section references

layered_requirements.description: Report correctly distinguishes federal baseline from state additions

research_framing.description: All findings framed as research, not compliance verdicts
